/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/sim_player.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim_player.dir/src/Demuxer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim_player.dir/src/Decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim_player.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim_player.dir/src/RendererSDL.cpp.o -o sim_player  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so
